","subject":"Great News! Your 3D World Order #{{order_number}} Has Shipped!"},"welcome_customer":{"html":" Welcome to 3D World

3D World

Welcome to the 3D World family, {{customer_name}}!

We're absolutely thrilled to have you! Thank you for making your first purchase with us. Your order #{{order_number}} is confirmed and we're already working on crafting your unique 3D printed articles.

At 3D World, we specialize in bringing imagination to life through high-quality, handcrafted 3D printed items. From intricate decor to functional gadgets, each piece is designed with passion and precision.

While you wait for your current order, we invite you to explore more of our unique creations. Discover something new and inspire your space!

Shop Our Collection

We're excited for you to experience the quality and artistry of 3D World. If you have any questions or need assistance, our team is always here to help.

Happy browsing and welcome aboard!
The 3D World Team

© {{store_name}}. All rights reserved.
